targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(provider_cost_total_microunits) / 1000000 AS provider_cost FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at)
SELECT sum(customer_charge_total_microunits) / 1000000 AS customer_charge FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at)
SELECT sum(gross_margin_microunits) / 1000000 AS gross_margin FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at)

SELECT if(sum(customer_charge_total_microunits)=0, 0, sum(gross_margin_microunits) / sum(customer_charge_total_microunits)) AS gross_margin_pct FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at)

SELECT $__timeInterval(finalized_at) AS time, sum(provider_cost_total_microunits) / 1000000 AS provider_cost, sum(customer_charge_total_microunits) / 1000000 AS customer_charge, sum(gross_margin_microunits) / 1000000 AS gross_margin FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT component, sum(provider_cost_microunits) / 1000000 AS provider_cost, sum(customer_charge_microunits) / 1000000 AS customer_charge, sum(customer_charge_microunits - provider_cost_microunits) / 1000000 AS gross_margin FROM voicemesh.billing_line_items_current WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY component ORDER BY provider_cost DESC

SELECT provider, model, usage_type, sum(quantity) AS usage_quantity, sum(provider_cost_microunits) / 1000000 AS provider_cost, sum(customer_charge_microunits) / 1000000 AS customer_charge, sum(customer_charge_microunits - provider_cost_microunits) / 1000000 AS gross_margin, count() AS sample_count FROM voicemesh.billing_line_items_current WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY provider, model, usage_type ORDER BY provider_cost DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT call_id, tenant_id, assistant_id, billable_seconds, billing_status, provider_cost_total_microunits / 1000000 AS provider_cost, customer_charge_total_microunits / 1000000 AS customer_charge, gross_margin_microunits / 1000000 AS gross_margin, stt_cost_microunits / 1000000 AS stt_cost, llm_cost_microunits / 1000000 AS llm_cost, tts_cost_microunits / 1000000 AS tts_cost, telephony_cost_microunits / 1000000 AS telephony_cost, pricing_version, trace_id FROM voicemesh.billing_calls_current WHERE $__timeFilter(finalized_at) ORDER BY provider_cost_total_microunits DESC LIMIT 50
